task_name: Medical Simulation Equipment Demonstration - Not an FLS Task
reason_for_classification: This video documents a medical conference/expo setting (CAE Apollo, CAEVimedix, CAEAres booths visible) with multiple speakers presenting ultrasound simulation equipment, echocardiography simulators, and emergency medicine mannequins. The footage shows booth attendants (including Caroline White, Simulation Specialist Advisor, and Christina Mastromonaco, PhD student) demonstrating equipment to conference attendees. There is no actual performance of an FLS task (no peg transfer, pattern cutting, endoloop, or suturing visible). The video is educational/promotional in nature.

frame_analyses.description: Caroline White (Simulation Specialist Advisor) speaking at conference booth, multiple display screens showing cardiology/ultrasound simulation content in background
Training mannequin visible on blue table; attendee performing echocardiography ultrasound simulation with probe on mannequin torso
frame_analyses.observation: Demonstration of ultrasound simulation equipment, not FLS task

frame_analyses.description: Instructor (male, gray blazer) holding ultrasound probe, guiding demonstration to attendees at CAEVimedix booth
Close-up of mannequin torso with ultrasound probe positioned; display screen shows cardiac imaging output
Conference attendee (female) in purple sweater performing probe manipulation on mannequin; other staff and attendees visible in background
frame_analyses.observation: Hands-on demonstration phase of simulation equipment

frame_analyses.description: 3D cardiac visualization display on screen showing heart anatomy with color Doppler overlay
Christina Mastromonaco (PhD student) speaking to camera, smiling, mannequin visible in background on blue table

Male attendee (VR headset visible) interacting with emergency medicine simulation station; mannequin on table

Multiple instructors and PhD students present equipment capabilities to conference attendees. Includes interviews with staff, equipment demonstrations, and conference floor footage. No FLS certification task is being performed.
confidence_rationale: Clear classification as non-FLS content. The video is unambiguously an instructional/promotional recording of medical simulation equipment at a professional conference. No FLS task components are present.
